_meta.task: papers P2 VERIFY infra — PP2 gate + PP3 manifest hook
_meta.honesty: zero external API calls. Zenodo publish step left intact behind a --dry-run branch + real flow; not invoked in this task. Manifest writes all gated by --dry-run. Original manifest.json md5=72f41489cde5b5e22833a48105267f23 size=63925 preserved.

verify_p2_1.rationale: Sidecar Python helper (scripts/pp2_gate.py) marked @hexa-first-exempt — avoids heredoc-heavy hexa glue, matches existing sync_zenodo.py / verify_dois.py sidecar pattern in scripts/. upload_zenodo.hexa calls it via /opt/homebrew/bin/python3 (bypasses the ~/.hx/bin/python3 remote dispatch shim).
verify_p2_1.criteria: has_python_fenced_block AND len(markers_found) >= 1, where markers in (@register, ossification_loop, 'N/N OK', N62). Identical to audit 2026-04-14 criteria.

integration_in_upload_zenodo_hexa.call_site: after file-existence check, before Zenodo create-deposit
integration_in_upload_zenodo_hexa.block_on_fail: returns from main() with '[PP2-GATE] BLOCK — upload aborted'

verify_p2_2.rationale: Sidecar scripts/manifest_update.py @hexa-first-exempt. Two subcommands: 'update' (single-paper post-upload hook) and 'reconcile' (log-sweep idempotent gap-filler). Atomic write via tempfile.mkstemp + os.fsync + os.replace (same dir, POSIX atomic rename).
fields_written_on_update: zenodo_doi (kept in sync with doi — both keys present in repo)
fields_on_insert: status=Published, doi, zenodo_doi, zenodo_record, date, published_at
verify_p2_2.atomic_write_test: Ran _atomic_write against a scratch tempdir with pre-existing GARBAGE content — verified replacement, JSON validity post-write, zero leftover .tmp files in dir.

reconcile_idempotency.guard: If entry already has doi AND status=Published AND doesn't need record/published_at/osf gap-fill → 'already_published' (skip).
reconcile_idempotency.doi_divergence_protection: If log-derived DOI differs from manifest DOI (e.g. PA-11 log has zenodo.19365144 but manifest has zenodo.19284372 from a prior publication), mark 'skipped_doi_divergence' — never overwrite a non-empty manifest DOI.
reconcile_idempotency.gap_fill_scope: missing zenodo_record, missing published_at, missing osf_id only.

reconcile_result_against_current_state.gap_filled_reason: EXPAND-P1-2 absorbed these entries but without published_at field. Reconcile would backfill published_at=2026-04-14 (today). Idempotent: re-running → already_published.
reconcile_result_against_current_state.skipped_divergence_reason: PA-* logs in upload_results_20260401_162906.txt reference newer Zenodo DOIs (19365*) while manifest holds older ones (19284*). Conservative guard — never overwrite. Manual decision required if user wants to migrate.
reconcile_result_against_current_state.claim_matches_spec: near-no-op: 3 benign field-fills (published_at backfill) + 15 safe skips + 0 data loss. Spec said 'should be a no-op or near-no-op since EXPAND-P1-2 already absorbed N6-fusion/neuro logs' — confirmed.

test_synthetic_delta.command: manifest_update.py update --paper-id SYNTHETIC-P2-TEST --doi 10.5281/zenodo.99999999 --zenodo-id 99999999 --title 'Synthetic Delta Test' --file synthetic.md --dry-run

integration_in_upload_zenodo_hexa.call_site: after Zenodo publish (or --dry-run skip), at end of main()
integration_in_upload_zenodo_hexa.failure_mode: non-zero exit from helper is printed but does not block exit (hook is best-effort — upload already succeeded).

sample_outputs.pp2_gate_fail_head:
[PP2-GATE] FAIL: verification markers missing
  path: anima/PA-11-emergent-speech.md
  reason: no_python_block_and_no_marker
  python_blocks: 0
  markers_found: (none)
sample_outputs.pp2_gate_skip: [PP2-GATE] WARN skip-bypass active for anima/PA-11-emergent-speech.md\n[PP2-GATE] WARN reason=no_python_block_and_no_marker

  DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.DRY_RUN
